title: Bear in area warning
body: Parks Canada issued a [Warning notice](https://parks.canada.ca/pn-np/bc/pacificrim/bulletins/7947b16d-253e-4fcd-a2a5-7fb33efc429c) for bear activity between Pachena Bay and Darling River.

title: Dead whale on beach
body:
A dead humpback whale on the beach between Trestle Creek and Klanawa River, near km 21. Please keep well back and continue past the area.

Parks staff are aware. This notice will be updated when further guidance is available.
